item.description: The United States and Iran traded strikes for the third straight night, putting the fragile peace deal in jeopardy. It comes as President Donald Trump is ordering the U.S. military to take control of the Strait of Hormuz and threatening a larger fee for ships that want safe passage. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for TODAY from Qatar.

media:content.media:title: US Escalates Attacks on Iran; Trump to Restart Naval Blockade
media:content.media:description: The United States and Iran traded strikes for the third straight night, putting the fragile peace deal in jeopardy. It comes as President Donald Trump is ordering the U.S. military to take control of the Strait of Hormuz and threatening a larger fee for ships that want safe passage. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for TODAY from Qatar.

item.title: US Escalates Attacks on Iran; Trump to Restart Naval Blockade

item.description: Cases of a severe stomach bug called Cyclosporiasis are surging across the United States, sickening thousands of Americans and even sending some to the hospital. NBC’s medical contributor Dr. John Torress joins TODAY to break down the symptoms and how you can stay safe.

media:content.media:title: Cyclosporiasis Outbreaks Hits More Than Half of the US
media:content.media:description: Cases of a severe stomach bug called Cyclosporiasis are surging across the United States, sickening thousands of Americans and even sending some to the hospital. NBC’s medical contributor Dr. John Torress joins TODAY to break down the symptoms and how you can stay safe.

item.title: Cyclosporiasis Outbreaks Hits More Than Half of the US

item.description: New details are emerging about the final moments of the late Sen. Lindsey Graham and what may have been his final phone call. It comes as his sister, Darline Graham Nordone, prepares to take the oath of office to serve the rest of her brother’s term, which ends in January. NBC’s Ryan Nobles reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Lindsey Graham's Sister to Serve the Rest of His Senate Term
media:content.media:description: New details are emerging about the final moments of the late Sen. Lindsey Graham and what may have been his final phone call. It comes as his sister, Darline Graham Nordone, prepares to take the oath of office to serve the rest of her brother’s term, which ends in January. NBC’s Ryan Nobles reports for TODAY.

item.title: Lindsey Graham's Sister to Serve the Rest of His Senate Term

item.description: There is a growing demand for answers after a fatal ICE-involved shooting in Maine. According to an ICE spokesperson, the shooting happened when agents tried to conduct a traffic stop and, they say, the vehicle tried to get away. That’s when ICE says an agent opened fire “fearing for public safety.” The incident, which was partly captured on video, is the second fatal shooting involving ICE agents in the past week. NBC’s Erin McLaughlin reports for TODAY. Warning: Some of the video may b

media:content.media:title: Officials Investigate Fatal ICE Shooting in Maine as Fallout Grows
media:content.media:description: There is a growing demand for answers after a fatal ICE-involved shooting in Maine. According to an ICE spokesperson, the shooting happened when agents tried to conduct a traffic stop and, they say, the vehicle tried to get away. That’s when ICE says an agent opened fire “fearing for public safety.” The incident, which was partly captured on video, is the second fatal shooting involving ICE agents in the past week. NBC’s Erin McLaughlin reports for TODAY. Warning: Some of the video may be disturbing.

item.title: Officials Investigate Fatal ICE Shooting in Maine as Fallout Grows

item.description: As the investigation into the death of 18-year-old Nolan Wells continues, two friends who were on Horn Island are speaking out. Wells went to the island in a boat on July Fourth and his body was found two days later. NBC News’ Kate Snow has the story.

media:content.media:title: New details in Mississippi teen’s death
media:content.media:description: As the investigation into the death of 18-year-old Nolan Wells continues, two friends who were on Horn Island are speaking out. Wells went to the island in a boat on July Fourth and his body was found two days later. NBC News’ Kate Snow has the story.

item.title: New details in Mississippi teen’s death

item.description: Los jugadores de la "Furia Roja" sorprendieron al joven crack con un curioso festejo en la práctica, a un día del partido de su vida en la Copa del Mundo. El mejor ambiente se respira en el campamento español previo a la Semifinal ante Francia.

media:content.media:title: Fila india para Yamal: así celebró España su cumpleaños en el entrenamiento previo a la Semifinal
media:content.media:description: Los jugadores de la "Furia Roja" sorprendieron al joven crack con un curioso festejo en la práctica, a un día del partido de su vida en la Copa del Mundo. El mejor ambiente se respira en el campamento español previo a la Semifinal ante Francia.

item.title: Fila india para Yamal: así celebró España su cumpleaños en el entrenamiento previo a la Semifinal

item.description: La joya de la Selección de España cumplió 19 años y habló de cara a la Semifinal ante Francia apuntando a lo alto, respondió a sus críticos asegurando que sabe de lo que es capaz, que no siente presión y aseguró que los goles no le preocupan.

media:content.media:title: Yamal se ve campeón del mundo y su gran deseo de cumpleaños: "Una victoria mañana e ir a Nueva York"
media:content.media:description: La joya de la Selección de España cumplió 19 años y habló de cara a la Semifinal ante Francia apuntando a lo alto, respondió a sus críticos asegurando que sabe de lo que es capaz, que no siente presión y aseguró que los goles no le preocupan.

item.title: Yamal se ve campeón del mundo y su gran deseo de cumpleaños: "Una victoria mañana e ir a Nueva York"

item.description: En la rueda de prensa previa a las semifinales de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026, el técnico de Francia sorprendió al declarar que España es favorita para llegar a la final, considerando los antecedentes entre ambas selecciones en partidos directos.

media:content.media:title: Deschamps pone a España como favorito sobre Francia en semifinales
media:content.media:description: En la rueda de prensa previa a las semifinales de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026, el técnico de Francia sorprendió al declarar que España es favorita para llegar a la final, considerando los antecedentes entre ambas selecciones en partidos directos.

item.title: Deschamps pone a España como favorito sobre Francia en semifinales

item.description: Previo a la semifinal entre Francia y España por la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026, el mediocampista Zaïre Emey aseguró que su equipo tiene jugadores que pueden marcar la diferencia en el partido y que buscarán revertir la mala racha ante los españoles.

media:content.media:title: Zaïre-Emery: “Somos Francia y no le tenemos miedo a nadie”
media:content.media:description: Previo a la semifinal entre Francia y España por la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026, el mediocampista Zaïre Emey aseguró que su equipo tiene jugadores que pueden marcar la diferencia en el partido y que buscarán revertir la mala racha ante los españoles.

item.title: Zaïre-Emery: “Somos Francia y no le tenemos miedo a nadie”

item.description: El DT español habló de la dificultad de vencer al subcampeón en semifinal, pero mandó un mensaje que ilusionó a la afición española; habló de cómo llegan sus jugadores, su conexión con Dios y el emotivo recuerdo de sus padres y hermanos fallecidos.

media:content.media:title: Luis de la Fuente se adueña de la frase que le dio esperanza a México, previo a Francia: "Y si sí"
media:content.media:description: El DT español habló de la dificultad de vencer al subcampeón en semifinal, pero mandó un mensaje que ilusionó a la afición española; habló de cómo llegan sus jugadores, su conexión con Dios y el emotivo recuerdo de sus padres y hermanos fallecidos.

item.title: Luis de la Fuente se adueña de la frase que le dio esperanza a México, previo a Francia: "Y si sí"

item.description: Los panelistas repasaron el exigente camino de Argentina hasta semifinales, con triunfos ante Cabo Verde, Egipto y Suiza. Messi lidera a una Albiceleste que sobrevivió a remontadas, prórrogas y momentos de máxima tensión.

media:content.media:title: Messi guía a una Argentina curtida por la adversidad | Conexión Mundial
media:content.media:description: Los panelistas repasaron el exigente camino de Argentina hasta semifinales, con triunfos ante Cabo Verde, Egipto y Suiza. Messi lidera a una Albiceleste que sobrevivió a remontadas, prórrogas y momentos de máxima tensión.

item.title: Messi guía a una Argentina curtida por la adversidad | Conexión Mundial

item.description: Los expertos analizaron el camino de Inglaterra hasta semifinales tras eliminar a RD del Congo, México y Noruega. Bellingham y Kane han sido claves en una selección que supo remontar y responder en los momentos decisivos.

media:content.media:title: Inglaterra llega a semifinales entre remontadas y carácter | Conexión Mundial
media:content.media:description: Los expertos analizaron el camino de Inglaterra hasta semifinales tras eliminar a RD del Congo, México y Noruega. Bellingham y Kane han sido claves en una selección que supo remontar y responder en los momentos decisivos.

item.title: Inglaterra llega a semifinales entre remontadas y carácter | Conexión Mundial

item.description: Los expertos analizaron el recorrido de España hasta semifinales tras superar a Austria, Portugal y Bélgica. La Roja llega consolidada y lista para enfrentar a Francia por un lugar en la gran final del Mundial 2026.

media:content.media:title: España confirma su candidatura antes de medirse a Francia | Conexión Mundial
media:content.media:description: Los expertos analizaron el recorrido de España hasta semifinales tras superar a Austria, Portugal y Bélgica. La Roja llega consolidada y lista para enfrentar a Francia por un lugar en la gran final del Mundial 2026.

item.title: España confirma su candidatura antes de medirse a Francia | Conexión Mundial

item.description: Los panelistas repasaron el camino de Francia hasta semifinales, con victorias ante Suecia, Paraguay y Marruecos. Mbappé, Dembélé y Olise llegan en gran momento antes del esperado duelo frente a España.

media:content.media:title: Francia llega encendida al gran duelo contra España | Conexión Mundial
media:content.media:description: Los panelistas repasaron el camino de Francia hasta semifinales, con victorias ante Suecia, Paraguay y Marruecos. Mbappé, Dembélé y Olise llegan en gran momento antes del esperado duelo frente a España.

item.title: Francia llega encendida al gran duelo contra España | Conexión Mundial

item.description: El cerebro silencioso de la "Roja" recordó sus inicios en Croacia, el cariño que le tiene al país donde creció como profesional y el momento de elegir selección. Olmo aparece entre líneas, acelera y es clave sin buscar los reflectores ni el protagonismo.

media:content.media:title: Dani Olmo y la elección sobre Croacia: "Mi sueño siempre fue España", | Rumbo a la Gran Final
media:content.media:description: El cerebro silencioso de la "Roja" recordó sus inicios en Croacia, el cariño que le tiene al país donde creció como profesional y el momento de elegir selección. Olmo aparece entre líneas, acelera y es clave sin buscar los reflectores ni el protagonismo.

item.title: Dani Olmo y la elección sobre Croacia: "Mi sueño siempre fue España", | Rumbo a la Gran Final

item.description: The New Year's Eve ball in Times Square has dropped for America's 250th anniversary, making this the first time the ball has dropped outside of a New Year's celebration.

media:content.media:title: New Year's Eve ball drops in Times Square for America's 250th
media:content.media:description: The New Year's Eve ball in Times Square has dropped for America's 250th anniversary, making this the first time the ball has dropped outside of a New Year's celebration.

item.title: New Year's Eve ball drops in Times Square for America's 250th

item.dc:creator: Steve Kopack
item.description: The price of crude oil surged again with benchmark Brent rising for a second straight day to more than $87 per barrel, and U.S. crude blowing past $80.

media:content.media:text: Ships continue to wait in Gulf of Oman for passage through Strait of Hormuz
media:content.media:description: Commercial vessels and oil tankers preparing to transit through the Strait of Hormuz, wait in the Gulf of Oman on June 17.

item.title: Oil hits $87 per barrel again after latest U.S. strikes on Iran, looming blockade

item.dc:creator: Adela Suliman
item.description: Sam Neill, the acclaimed New Zealand actor best known for “Jurassic Park” had suffered from pneumonia, according to a co-star.

media:content.media:text: Day 9 - Sitges Film Festival 2019
media:content.media:description: Sam Neill in 2019.

media:content.media:text: Jurassic Park
media:content.media:description: Sam Neill in 2019.

media:content.media:text: Cillian Murphy and Sam Neill in the first season of "Peaky Blinders."
media:content.media:description: Sam Neill in 2019.

item.title: Sam Neill had pneumonia before his death, co-star says, as tributes pour in

item.dc:creator: Steve Kopack
item.description: Inflation eased to 3.5% in June, thanks to energy prices that fell after the U.S. and Iran signed a memorandum of understanding in a bid to end the ongoing war.

media:content.media:text: U.S.-VIRGINIA-ARLINGTON-CPI-MAY-RISE
media:content.media:description: People shop for groceries at a store in Arlington, Virginia, the United States, on June 10, 2026.

item.title: Inflation eased to 3.5% in June, just before energy prices spiked again

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: We spoke with experts about pet hair vacuums and compiled a list of recommendations based on their guidance. Shop our best picks from Bissell, Shark and more.

media:content.media:text: Experts say the best vacuums for pet hair have anti-tangle brush heads and rotating brush rolls. They also come with included attachments.
media:content.media:description: Experts say the best vacuums for pet hair have anti-tangle brush heads and rotating brush rolls. They also come with included attachments.

media:content.media:text: Detect vacuum standing upright on the floor.
media:content.media:description: Experts say the best vacuums for pet hair have anti-tangle brush heads and rotating brush rolls. They also come with included attachments.

media:content.media:text: Shark Cyclone handheld vacuum cleaning a couch cushion.
media:content.media:description: Experts say the best vacuums for pet hair have anti-tangle brush heads and rotating brush rolls. They also come with included attachments.

item.title: Tired of stubborn pet hair? Make sure you’re using the right vacuum

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: KN95 masks can offer the best protection against Covid, according to the CDC. We asked experts how to wear KN95 masks, plus the best brands to shop from.

media:content.media:text: KN95 masks are manufactured to offer 95% protection from particulate matter, like N95 masks.
media:content.media:description: KN95 masks are manufactured to offer 95% protection from particulate matter, like N95 masks.

media:content.media:text: KN95 masks are manufactured to offer 95% protection from particulate matter, like N95 masks.
media:content.media:description: KN95 masks are manufactured to offer 95% protection from particulate matter, like N95 masks.

item.title: The best KN95 masks to shop, according to experts

item.dc:creator: Harry Rabinowitz
item.description: I tested nearly a dozen point-and-shoot cameras from Kodak, Fujifilm, Sony, Leica, and Ricoh to find the perfect balance of size and quality.

media:content.media:text: My top picks are easy to use and fun for both beginners and experts.
media:content.media:description: My top picks are easy to use and fun for both beginners and experts.

media:content.media:text: My top picks are easy to use and fun for both beginners and experts.
media:content.media:description: My top picks are easy to use and fun for both beginners and experts.

media:content.media:text: A wide angle photo of the Radio City Music Hall neon sign at night, with people and cars blurred in motion.
media:content.media:description: My top picks are easy to use and fun for both beginners and experts.

media:content.media:text: A photo of green and red houses along a river in a city.
media:content.media:description: My top picks are easy to use and fun for both beginners and experts.

media:content.media:text: A photo of a musician playing electric guitar on a stage with blue and green flood lights in the background.
media:content.media:description: My top picks are easy to use and fun for both beginners and experts.

media:content.media:text: A close up of sparkling water in an old-fashioned mason jar glass, photographed in black and white.
media:content.media:description: My top picks are easy to use and fun for both beginners and experts.

media:content.media:text: A video of the writer at different moments in their work day — commuting, in an elevator and with co-workers.
media:content.media:description: My top picks are easy to use and fun for both beginners and experts.

media:content.media:text: A photo of two hawks sitting high up on a tree branch
media:content.media:description: My top picks are easy to use and fun for both beginners and experts.

media:content.media:text: A headshot of the writer wearing black sunglasses, looking away to the right of the camera.
media:content.media:description: My top picks are easy to use and fun for both beginners and experts.

media:content.media:text: A close up of a man with his arms crossed sitting at a marble white table.
media:content.media:description: My top picks are easy to use and fun for both beginners and experts.

item.title: The best point-and-shoot cameras of 2026 are compact and easy to use

item.dc:creator: Ashley Morris
item.description: Save up to 50% on Lululemon’s bestselling activewear during the Summer Sale, including leggings, bags, shorts, t-shirts and more.

media:content.media:text: The Lululemon Summer Sale includes discounts across men and women’s apparel, accessories, bags and more.
media:content.media:description: The Lululemon Summer Sale includes discounts across men and women’s apparel, accessories, bags and more.

media:content.media:text: The Lululemon Summer Sale includes discounts across men and women’s apparel, accessories, bags and more.
media:content.media:description: The Lululemon Summer Sale includes discounts across men and women’s apparel, accessories, bags and more.

item.title: The best deals from Lululemon’s Summer Sale: Get up to 50% off

item.description: A group of Jeffrey Epstein survivors is urging the Senate to oppose Todd Blanche’s nomination to be attorney general. In a PSA first shared with NBC News ahead of Blanche’s confirmation hearing, a dozen survivors say he is responsible for releasing personal information about them that should have been redacted under the Epstein Files Transparency Act, while also failing to follow investigative leads about Epstein’s associates. Epstein survivors Liz Stein and Joanna Harrison join NBC News'

media:content.media:title: Epstein survivors film PSA asking senators to vote against Todd Blanche for attorney general
media:content.media:description: A group of Jeffrey Epstein survivors is urging the Senate to oppose Todd Blanche’s nomination to be attorney general. In a PSA first shared with NBC News ahead of Blanche’s confirmation hearing, a dozen survivors say he is responsible for releasing personal information about them that should have been redacted under the Epstein Files Transparency Act, while also failing to follow investigative leads about Epstein’s associates. Epstein survivors Liz Stein and Joanna Harrison join NBC News' Hallie Jackson to discuss their opposition to Blanche's confirmation.

item.title: Epstein survivors film PSA asking senators to vote against Todd Blanche for attorney general

item.dc:creator: Gary Grumbach
Dareh Gregorian
item.description: A federal judge in Florida has found President Donald Trump’s lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service was brought in “bad faith” for an “improper purpose.”

media:content.media:text: Donald Trump as seen from the side, standing in between white columns
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump at the White House on July 6.

item.title: Judge says Trump admin tried to ‘manipulate the judicial process’ with its IRS settlement
